title: Fresh French Asparagus Bisque
description: A light and refreshing French-inspired soup featuring fresh asparagus, dry white wine, and a hint of lemon.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the trimmed asparagus and cook for 3-5 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the dry white wine and cook until the liquid has almost completely evaporated.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
Simmer for 10-12 minutes until the asparagus is tender.
Stir in the lemon juice and season with coarse salt to taste.
Blend the soup using an immersion blender or a regular blender until smooth.
Return the soup to the saucepan and stir in the vegan cream (or non-dairy yogurt).
Heat the soup over low heat until warmed through.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
